user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of disciplinary action approvers with their group ID, location and approvers, so that I can see who approves disciplinary actions for each location
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Disciplinary Action Approvers screen; When the list loads; Then I see columns for Exit Approvers Group ID, Location Id, Location(s) and Approver(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new disciplinary action approver, so that I can configure who approves disciplinary actions for a location
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Disciplinary Action Approvers screen; When I click Add new disciplinary action approver and provide location and approver details; Then the new approver is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing disciplinary action approver, so that I can keep approver assignments up to date
acceptance_criteria: Given a disciplinary action approver is listed; When I click Edit and update the location or approver; Then the changes are saved and reflected in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to paginate through the approvers list, so that I can review large numbers of approver configurations
acceptance_criteria: Given the approvers list spans multiple pages; When I use the pagination controls; Then the corresponding items are displayed with the item count shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel out of the approvers configuration, so that I can leave without making unwanted changes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Disciplinary Action Approvers screen; When I click Cancel; Then I exit without saving any changes
